seoTitle: InventChip Solutions | EV, Solar, Industrial | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore InventChip power solutions for electric vehicles, solar inverters, and industrial applications. Cost-effective SiC reference designs.

faqs.question: What solution categories does InventChip offer?
faqs.answer: InventChip offers comprehensive power solutions across three key categories: Electric Vehicle solutions including traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters utilizing SiC MOSFETs for maximum efficiency; Solar and Renewable Energy solutions featuring solar inverters and energy storage systems; and Industrial Power solutions encompassing motor drives, power supplies, and welding equipment. Each solution includes reference designs and technical documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution categories below or contact our FAE team for customized solution recommendations.

faqs.question: Are InventChip solutions cost-effective compared to international brands?
faqs.answer: Yes, InventChip solutions are cost-effective: (1) Device cost - 20-30% lower than international brands. (2) Performance - Comparable efficiency. (3) System cost - Lower BOM cost. (4) Support - Local China FAE included. (5) Lead time - Shorter delivery. (6) Quality - No compromise on reliability. (7) Value - Best performance per dollar. Excellent value proposition for cost-sensitive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip solutions offer 20-30% cost savings with comparable performance.

faqs.question: Does InventChip provide reference designs for EV applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, InventChip provides EV reference designs: (1) Traction inverters - Complete inverter designs. (2) Onboard chargers - 11kW and 22kW OBC. (3) DC-DC converters - HV to LV conversion. (4) Documentation - Full schematics and BOM. (5) Automotive - AEC-Q101 devices. (6) Cost-effective - Lower system cost. (7) Support - Local FAE assistance. Reference designs accelerate EV development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with InventChip reference designs for cost-effective EV solutions.

solutions.name: Electric Vehicle Powertrain
solutions.subtitle: Cost-Effective Traction Inverter Solutions
solutions.description: InventChip SiC MOSFETs enable cost-effective EV traction inverters with excellent efficiency for 400V and 800V systems.
solutions.longDescription: InventChip's EV traction inverter solutions leverage advanced SiC MOSFET technology to deliver excellent performance at competitive pricing. With voltage ratings from 650V to 1200V and AEC-Q101 qualification, these solutions are ideal for cost-sensitive EV applications. The solutions include reference designs, gate driver recommendations, and thermal management guidelines.
features: Complete reference designs with schematics and BOM

faeInsights.content: InventChip SiC MOSFETs offer excellent value for EV traction inverters. The IV1D12040T3 provides competitive performance at 20-30% lower cost than international brands. For cost-sensitive EV projects in China, InventChip is an excellent choice with local support and stable supply.
recommendations: Contact local FAE for design support

faqs.question: What power levels can InventChip EV inverters support?
faqs.answer: InventChip EV inverter power levels: (1) Compact EVs - 50-80kW. (2) Mid-size EVs - 80-120kW. (3) Full-size EVs - 120-150kW. (4) Voltage - 400V and 800V systems. (5) Cost-effective - Lower system cost. (6) Efficiency - 98%+ achievable. (7) Applications - Passenger EVs, commercial vehicles. Cost-effective solutions for mainstream EVs.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip supports 50-150kW EV inverters at competitive cost.

faqs.question: How much cost savings does InventChip provide?
faqs.answer: InventChip cost savings: (1) Device cost - 20-30% lower. (2) System BOM - 15-25% reduction. (3) Support - Local FAE included. (4) Lead time - Shorter, less inventory. (5) Total cost - Significant savings. (6) Quality - No compromise. (7) ROI - Faster payback. Excellent value for cost-sensitive projects.
faqs.decisionGuide: 20-30% device cost savings with comparable quality and performance.

faqs.question: Is InventChip suitable for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, InventChip is automotive qualified: (1) AEC-Q101 - Full qualification. (2) IATF 16949 - Quality system. (3) PPAP - Production support. (4) Reliability - Automotive grade. (5) Applications - Traction, OBC, DC-DC. (6) Support - Automotive FAE team. (7) Track record - Proven in EVs. Fully qualified for automotive.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip is fully automotive qualified; ideal for cost-sensitive EVs.

faqs.question: What local support does LiTong provide in China?
faqs.answer: LiTong China support: (1) Local FAE - China-based team. (2) Language - Mandarin support. (3) Response - Fast local response. (4) Design review - On-site support. (5) Samples - Fast local delivery. (6) Training - Local workshops. (7) Logistics - Domestic shipping. Comprehensive local support.
faqs.decisionGuide: LiTong provides full local support for InventChip in China market.

faqs.question: What is the lead time for InventChip solutions?
faqs.answer: InventChip lead times: (1) Standard - 4-6 weeks. (2) Samples - 1-2 weeks. (3) High volume - Contact for schedule. (4) Stock - Available from LiTong. (5) Forecast - Better with forecast. (6) Emergency - FAE can expedite. (7) Modules - Longer lead time. Competitive lead times.
faqs.decisionGuide: 4-6 week standard lead time; faster for samples and stock items.

faqs.question: How does InventChip compare to Wolfspeed and Infineon?
faqs.answer: InventChip vs competitors: (1) Performance - Comparable specs. (2) Quality - Same certifications. (3) Price - 20-30% lower. (4) Support - Local in China. (5) Supply - Stable domestic. (6) Innovation - Catching up. (7) Applications - Same use cases. Excellent value alternative.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip offers comparable quality at significantly lower cost.

faqs.question: What types of solar inverters can use InventChip solutions?
faqs.answer: InventChip solar applications: (1) Residential - 5-10kW single-phase. (2) Commercial - 30-100kW three-phase. (3) String inverters - Most common. (4) Central inverters - With modules. (5) Hybrid - Solar plus storage. (6) Cost-effective - Competitive pricing. (7) Efficiency - >98% achievable. Solutions for all solar segments.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip solutions cover residential to commercial solar inverters.

faqs.question: How does InventChip improve solar inverter ROI?
faqs.answer: InventChip ROI benefits: (1) Device cost - 20-30% lower. (2) Efficiency - >98% maintains yield. (3) System cost - Lower BOM. (4) Reliability - Proven quality. (5) Support - Local FAE. (6) Lead time - Faster delivery. (7) Payback - Better ROI. Cost-effective without compromising performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Lower device cost with maintained efficiency improves solar ROI.

faqs.question: Can InventChip be used for energy storage systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, for energy storage: (1) Battery inverters - Bidirectional DC-AC. (2) DC-DC converters - Battery management. (3) Efficiency - High round-trip efficiency. (4) Cost - Lower system cost. (5) Applications - Residential to utility. (6) Support - Design assistance. (7) Quality - Reliable operation. Cost-effective storage solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use InventChip for cost-effective battery inverter designs.

faqs.question: What is the price advantage for solar applications?
faqs.answer: Solar price advantage: (1) Device cost - 20-30% lower. (2) System cost - 15-20% BOM reduction. (3) Competition - Better pricing vs competitors. (4) Volume - Better at scale. (5) Quality - No compromise. (6) Support - Included. (7) Value - Best per dollar. Significant cost advantage.

faqs.question: Does InventChip meet solar inverter reliability requirements?
faqs.answer: Yes, meets requirements: (1) Quality - ISO 9001 certified. (2) Testing - 100% tested. (3) Lifetime - 25-year design life. (4) Temperature - Wide operating range. (5) Humidity - Protected packages. (6) Standards - Meet IEC requirements. (7) Track record - Proven in field. Reliable for solar applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip meets all reliability requirements for solar inverters.

faqs.question: What support is available for solar inverter design?
faqs.answer: Solar design support: (1) Reference designs - Complete schematics. (2) FAE support - Design review. (3) Simulation - Loss calculation. (4) Thermal - Heatsink design. (5) EMI - Filter design. (6) Testing - Validation support. (7) Training - Technical workshops. Comprehensive design support.
